posts.author: Jay_Shukla
posts.community: JNK India ltd - Oil and Gas sector proxy?
posts.text: The company has mentioned in its exchange filing that “This will have no impact on the declared revenue or associated profits” However, my understanding is that, this will have impact on this year’s (i.e. FY 27) revenue & profit projections (even though the management I said there is no impact on revenue and profit) Correct me if I am wrong Note: Invested, views are biased.

posts.author: Shwetha
posts.community: JNK India ltd - Oil and Gas sector proxy?
posts.text: ~200cr Incinerator Package order from ADNOC’s TA’ZIZ Salt Project got cancelled. ( Link ) Per filing, JNK failed to get mandatory approval from project’s tech licensor (either Thyssenkrupp nucera or Technip)
